content: We can reframe curiosity-driven single-agent reinforcement learning intrinsic reward modules (like ICM and RND) as a minimal embedded A2A Protocol between a fixed 'world model agent' and a learning 'policy agent' within a single monolithic agent architecture. This splits the monolithic agent's intrinsic motivation loop into a structured agent-to-agent negotiation of novelty, turning internal curiosity into a standardized inter-agent communication protocol rather than a monolithic calculation.
